# AI Chef Pro

> AI Chef Pro (aichef.pro) is a Spanish-language SaaS platform of specialized AI agents for hospitality and food service professionals — restaurant owners, chefs, F&B managers, caterers, bakeries, ice cream shops and chocolatiers. It bundles 70+ vertical AI apps (recipe costing, menu engineering, HACCP, content generation, local SEO, financial planning) with a catalog of 30 downloadable digital products (Excel templates, operational checklists, business-plan guides) created by Chef John Guerrero (29 years in fine-dining hospitality, 15 years in gastronomic consulting). Built for independent operators who want enterprise-grade tooling without enterprise pricing.

## About

- [Homepage](https://aichef.pro/): main landing page introducing the AI Chef Pro platform and its mission.
- [Pricing](https://aichef.pro/precios): current subscription tiers and what each plan includes.
- [About Chef John Guerrero](https://aichef.pro/sobre-nosotros): founder bio, career history and editorial standards.
- [Contact](https://aichef.pro/contacto): direct contact form and support email (info@aichef.pro).
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://aichef.pro/faq): platform-wide FAQ covering subscriptions, refunds, languages and tooling.

## Digital Products Hub

- [Productos Digitales — full catalog](https://aichef.pro/productos-digitales): hub listing all 30 downloadable digital products with filters by format, role and concept.

### Excel Template Kits

- [Pro Prompts eBook (€9)](https://aichef.pro/pro-prompts-ebook): library of 200+ professional prompts for hospitality AI workflows.
- [Kit de Escandallos Pro (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-escandallos): recipe-costing Excel templates with real-cost gestion.
- [Pack APPCC (€14)](https://aichef.pro/pack-appcc): 17 templates for Spanish HACCP food-safety inspections.
- [Kit Gestión de Personal y Turnos (€14)](https://aichef.pro/kit-gestion-personal): staff scheduling, hours control and productivity ratios.
- [Kit Control de Inventario y Compras (€14)](https://aichef.pro/kit-inventario): supplier management, stock control and purchasing workflows.
- [Kit Plan Financiero (€39)](https://aichef.pro/kit-plan-financiero): full financial planning package — cash flow, break-even, P&L, ratios dashboard.

### "Cómo Montar..." Business Plan Guides

- [Guía Cómo Montar una Dark Kitchen (€24)](https://aichef.pro/guia-dark-kitchen): step-by-step plan to launch a virtual / cloud kitchen.
- [Guía Restaurante Gastronómico 65 Plazas (€85)](https://aichef.pro/guia-restaurante-gastronomico): premium Michelin / Sol Repsol-oriented opening guide.
- [Guía Restaurante Casual 80 Plazas (€65)](https://aichef.pro/guia-restaurante-casual): casual-dining opening guide template for thematic concepts.
- [Guía Restaurante Mexicano 80 Plazas (€65)](https://aichef.pro/guia-restaurante-mexicano): full plan for a Mexican restaurant in Spain.
- [Guía Restaurante Peruano 80 Plazas (€65)](https://aichef.pro/guia-restaurante-peruano): full plan for a Peruvian restaurant in Spain.
- [Guía Restaurante Japonés 60 Plazas (€65)](https://aichef.pro/guia-restaurante-japones): full plan for a Japanese restaurant in Spain.

### Recurring-Tasks Kits by Concept

- [Kit Tareas Restaurante Casual (€14)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas): operational checklists for casual restaurant.
- [Kit Tareas Cafetería / Brunch (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-cafeteria): operational checklists for cafe / brunch concept.
- [Kit Tareas Pizzería (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-pizzeria): operational checklists for pizzeria.
- [Kit Tareas Hamburguesería (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-hamburgueseria): operational checklists for burger restaurant.
- [Kit Tareas Dark Kitchen (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-dark-kitchen): operational checklists for dark / cloud kitchen.
- [Kit Tareas Pastelería (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-pasteleria): operational checklists for bakery / pastry obrador.
- [Kit Tareas Bar / Cocktails (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-bar): operational checklists for cocktail bar.
- [Kit Tareas Catering / Eventos (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-catering): operational checklists for catering and events.
- [Kit Tareas Hotel Completo (€18.50)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-hotel): full F&B operational checklists for hotel.
- [Kit Tareas Heladería Artesanal (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-heladeria): operational checklists for artisan ice cream shop.
- [Kit Tareas Chocolatería (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-chocolateria): operational checklists for chocolate / bonbon shop.
- [Kit Tareas Chef Privado (€18)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-chef-privado): operational checklists for private / personal chef.
- [Kit Tareas Restaurante Creativo (€12)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-restaurante-creativo): operational checklists for creative / signature restaurant.
- [Kit Tareas Sushi Bar (€14)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-sushi-bar): operational checklists for sushi bar with rice pH and anisakis HACCP.
- [Kit Tareas Asador / Josper (€14)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-asador): operational checklists for steakhouse / Josper grill with dry-age and cuts.
- [Kit Tareas Marisquería (€14)](https://aichef.pro/kit-tareas-marisqueria): operational checklists for seafood restaurant with live tank, ice display and HACCP.

### Bundles

- [Mega Pack Tareas (€89)](https://aichef.pro/mega-pack-tareas): bundle of 13 task kits with 151 templates covering all hospitality concepts.

## Use Cases — by Role

- [Use Cases Hub](https://aichef.pro/usos): index of all 51 hospitality use cases organized by role, concept and task.
- [Propietario de Restaurante](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/propietario-restaurante): AI workflows for restaurant owners.
- [Gerente de Restaurante](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/gerente-restaurante): AI workflows for restaurant managers.
- [Director de Operaciones (Grupo)](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/director-operaciones-grupo-restauracion): AI workflows for multi-unit operations directors.
- [Chef Ejecutivo Corporativo](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/chef-ejecutivo-corporativo): AI workflows for corporate executive chefs.
- [Chef de Cocina](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/chef-jefe-cocina): AI workflows for head chefs.
- [Sous Chef](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/sous-chef): AI workflows for sous chefs.
- [Chef de Catering](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/chef-catering): AI workflows for catering chefs.
- [Propietario de Catering](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/propietario-empresa-catering): AI workflows for catering business owners.
- [Bartender / Coctelero](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/bartender-coctelero): AI workflows for bartenders and mixologists.
- [Pizzero / Pizzaiolo](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/pizzero-pizzaiolo): AI workflows for pizzaiolos.
- [Panadero Artesanal](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/panadero-artesanal): AI workflows for artisan bakers.
- [Chocolatero / Bombonero](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/chocolatero-bombonero): AI workflows for chocolatiers.
- [Chef Privado / Personal Chef](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/chef-privado-personal-chef): AI workflows for private and personal chefs.
- [F&B Manager (Hotel)](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/fb-manager-hotel): AI workflows for hotel F&B managers.
- [Maître / Jefe de Sala](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/maitre-jefe-sala): AI workflows for maîtres and head waiters.
- [Sommelier](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/sommelier): AI workflows for sommeliers.
- [Maestro Asador / Parrillero](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/maestro-asador-parrillero): AI workflows for grill masters.
- [Maestro Heladero](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/maestro-heladero): AI workflows for master gelato makers.
- [Repostero / Pastelero](https://aichef.pro/usos/rol/repostero-pastelero): AI workflows for pastry chefs.

## Use Cases — by Concept

- [Restaurante Casual](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/restaurante-casual): AI workflows for casual restaurants.
- [Cafetería / Brunch](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/cafeteria-brunch): AI workflows for cafe and brunch concepts.
- [Pizzería](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/pizzeria): AI workflows for pizzerias.
- [Hamburguesería](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/hamburgueseria): AI workflows for burger restaurants.
- [Dark Kitchen](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/dark-kitchen): AI workflows for cloud / dark kitchens.
- [Pastelería / Obrador](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/pasteleria-obrador): AI workflows for bakery and pastry shops.
- [Bar / Cocktails](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/bar-cocktails): AI workflows for cocktail bars.
- [Catering / Eventos](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/catering-eventos): AI workflows for catering and events.
- [Hotel Completo F&B](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/hotel-completo-fb): AI workflows for full-service hotel F&B.
- [Heladería Artesanal](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/heladeria-artesanal): AI workflows for artisan ice cream shops.
- [Chocolatería / Bombonería](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/chocolateria-bomboneria): AI workflows for chocolate shops.
- [Restaurante Creativo / De Autor](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/restaurante-creativo-autor): AI workflows for creative / signature restaurants.
- [Restaurante Gastronómico (Michelin)](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/restaurante-gastronomico-michelin): AI workflows for fine-dining Michelin-oriented restaurants.
- [Restaurante Mexicano](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/restaurante-mexicano): AI workflows for Mexican restaurants.
- [Restaurante Peruano](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/restaurante-peruano): AI workflows for Peruvian restaurants.
- [Restaurante Japonés](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/restaurante-japones): AI workflows for Japanese restaurants.
- [Restaurante Nikkei](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/restaurante-nikkei): AI workflows for Nikkei (Japanese-Peruvian) restaurants.
- [Restaurante Plant-Based / Vegano](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/restaurante-plant-based-vegano): AI workflows for plant-based and vegan restaurants.
- [Asador / Parrilla / Steakhouse](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/asador-parrilla-steakhouse): AI workflows for steakhouses and grill houses.
- [Coffee Shop Specialty](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/coffee-shop-specialty): AI workflows for specialty coffee shops.
- [Sushi Bar](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/sushi-bar): AI workflows for sushi bars.
- [Gastrobar / Tapas](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/gastrobar-tapas): AI workflows for tapas bars and gastrobars.
- [Food Truck](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/food-truck): AI workflows for food trucks.
- [Restaurante Italiano](https://aichef.pro/usos/concepto/restaurante-italiano): AI workflows for Italian restaurants.

## Use Cases — by Task

- [Escandallos con IA](https://aichef.pro/usos/tarea/escandallos-con-ia): AI-driven recipe costing.
- [Menú Degustación con IA](https://aichef.pro/usos/tarea/menu-degustacion-con-ia): AI-driven tasting menu design.
- [Fichas Técnicas con IA](https://aichef.pro/usos/tarea/fichas-tecnicas-con-ia): AI-driven technical recipe sheets.
- [Maridajes con IA](https://aichef.pro/usos/tarea/maridajes-con-ia): AI-driven wine and beverage pairings.
- [Reducir Mermas con IA](https://aichef.pro/usos/tarea/reducir-mermas-con-ia): AI-driven food waste reduction.
- [APPCC Digital con IA](https://aichef.pro/usos/tarea/appcc-digital-con-ia): AI-driven digital HACCP workflows.
- [Carta Estacional con IA](https://aichef.pro/usos/tarea/carta-estacional-con-ia): AI-driven seasonal menu design.
- [Foto Gastronómica con IA](https://aichef.pro/usos/tarea/foto-gastronomica-con-ia): AI-driven food photography generation.

## Programmatic SEO — City Pages (Spanish)

- [Cities Hub](https://aichef.pro/recursos/ciudades): index of city-specific resources for opening and operating restaurants.
- Coverage: 15 Spanish-speaking cities (Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, Sevilla, Málaga, Bilbao, Zaragoza, Ciudad de México, Guadalajara, Monterrey, Querétaro, Bogotá, Medellín, Buenos Aires, Santiago) × 5 modifiers (abrir-restaurante, licencia-restaurante, software-gestion-restaurante, escandallo-restaurante, plan-negocio-restaurante) = 75 city-modifier landing pages.
- Pattern: `https://aichef.pro/{modifier}-en-{city-slug}` (e.g. `/abrir-restaurante-en-madrid`, `/licencia-restaurante-en-bogota`).

## English Versions (en.aichef.pro)

- [English platform homepage](https://en.aichef.pro/): English-language entry point, served via auto-language routing for non-Spanish speakers.
- All 51 use cases are mirrored under `/use-cases/role/`, `/use-cases/concept/` and `/use-cases/task/` paths in English.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://aichef.pro/llms-full.txt): expanded version of this index with full descriptions for each product, role, concept, task and city page.
- [Sitemap](https://aichef.pro/sitemap.xml): full XML sitemap covering all indexable pages (~580 URLs).
- [Robots](https://aichef.pro/robots.txt): crawler directives.
